expected_tangles.about: Evan and Fay are independently building the same utility — an HTTP retry wrapper with exponential backoff, jitter, max-attempts and Retry-After — in two repos under different names (retryWithBackoff vs Retry); duplicated effort that should be one shared helper
Glen adds CI test-retry to the pipeline YAML — the word 'retry' overlaps, but it is rerunning flaky tests in CI, not an HTTP backoff helper; different domain, no shared code
